repo_files.content:
[copr:copr.fedorainfracloud.org:mrussell:inspectah]
name=Copr repo for inspectah owned by mrussell
baseurl=https://download.copr.fedorainfracloud.org/results/mrussell/inspectah/epel-9-$basearch/
type=rpm-md
skip_if_unavailable=True
gpgcheck=1
gpgkey=https://download.copr.fedorainfracloud.org/results/mrussell/inspectah/pubkey.gpg
repo_gpgcheck=0
enabled=1
enabled_metadata=1

[highavailability]
name=CentOS Stream $releasever - HighAvailability

repo_gpgcheck=0

countme=1
enabled=0
